5400ee44-e271-4546-8666-3a30d8aaf30a.name: #AbdominalPain
5400ee44-e271-4546-8666-3a30d8aaf30a.controller_advice: Collect details about the location, intensity, and nature of the pain. Inquire about other associated symptoms or factors, such as vomiting or recent surgeries. Advise the caller to refrain from giving food or liquids to the person experiencing the pain. Based on the severity of symptoms, dispatch EMS for evaluation and potential transport to a medical facility.

5ca929f1-3906-47d1-b448-342414082c28.name: #AccidentalPress
5ca929f1-3906-47d1-b448-342414082c28.controller_advice: The user accidentally activated a panic. Provide reassurance so that the user is at ease and resolve the panic after confirming the user's security code or last four digits.

383347be-bdcf-4789-a036-f5e2b667326b.name: #AccountIssue
383347be-bdcf-4789-a036-f5e2b667326b.controller_advice: Relating to user account, i.e. amounts outstanding, payments outstanding, account balance,etc.: Refer the user to the in-app support or southafrica@bolt.eu.

d966b0e9-3c91-41aa-9df7-796d6f513683.name: #AggravatedAssault
d966b0e9-3c91-41aa-9df7-796d6f513683.controller_advice: Assualt with the intent to inflict serious bodily harm: Keep the person calm, instruct them to find a safe place, do not engage. Contact law enforcement.

6d0595f4-ada8-4d29-be39-6222abbaeb25.name: #AllergicReaction
6d0595f4-ada8-4d29-be39-6222abbaeb25.controller_advice: Determine the severity of the reaction and ask if the person has a known allergy or carries an epinephrine auto-injector (e.g., EpiPen). Instruct the caller to administer the auto-injector if available and guide them on proper usage if needed. Dispatch EMS for immediate medical care and advise the caller to keep the person calm and monitor their condition.

ad5dafdc-711f-4095-bed7-4247e9014c8c.name: #AmbulanceOnScene
ad5dafdc-711f-4095-bed7-4247e9014c8c.controller_advice: The patient may receive oxygen, medications, ECG monitoring, fluid administration or a host of other interventions. If the patient is conscious, treatment options should be discussed with both the patient and family members. EMS will generally transport to the hospital designated by the patient

8f6549fd-820d-4c3d-b0cb-9bc70043ddfa.name: #AmbulanceTransportingClient
8f6549fd-820d-4c3d-b0cb-9bc70043ddfa.controller_advice: Patient was treated on scene and transported to the nearest hospital for treatment

5dee75cb-f0f2-40a4-a5cd-e7ed5fab3996.name: #AnythingElseICanAssistWith?
5dee75cb-f0f2-40a4-a5cd-e7ed5fab3996.controller_advice: Anything else I can assist you with is a polite way to offer help to someone. If someone indicates they don't need more help, it's best to respect their wishes. However, you can ask if they're sure, in case they're hesitant to ask for help.

79705c3c-adfe-4fa9-9b63-ae4ca5265b8a.name: #APITesting
79705c3c-adfe-4fa9-9b63-ae4ca5265b8a.controller_advice: Client testing API panics. Ask involved parties before resolving the panic.

f6f41212-da83-49ee-ab14-150764165e4f.name: #AppAbuse
f6f41212-da83-49ee-ab14-150764165e4f.controller_advice: The user is abusing the panic button by continuously pressing it for non-emergency situations for which we cannot dispatch armed response.

28f06d6a-5495-4abe-93cb-b826cf6791e8.name: #AppSupport
28f06d6a-5495-4abe-93cb-b826cf6791e8.controller_advice: App related issues, bugs, or FAQ: Refer the user to app support or southafrica@bolt.eu.

94390427-e887-4f02-bb15-bc68dd9d998b.name: #ArmedRobbery
94390427-e887-4f02-bb15-bc68dd9d998b.controller_advice: Theft or robbery committed with the use of firearms:Advise the person to comply with the robber's demands for their safety. Remember as much detail as possible. Contact law enforcement.

1a6878b5-ebe2-4139-aa21-f070a5b34a43.name: #ArrivedAfterCancellation
1a6878b5-ebe2-4139-aa21-f070a5b34a43.controller_advice: RO arrived but was cancelled while en route to the location.

6cb504bc-af72-4b95-a3f5-d941ece8aab6.name: #ArrivedAtLocation
6cb504bc-af72-4b95-a3f5-d941ece8aab6.controller_advice: When the responder arrives at the correct location as given on the dashboard.

378166d2-d15e-4bf2-a4be-a5cc005c0ed8.name: #Arson
378166d2-d15e-4bf2-a4be-a5cc005c0ed8.controller_advice: Intentional act of setting fire to property:Determine location, advise evacuation if necessary, contact fire department

92e34978-a71e-4b83-9d98-fe34626393fe.name: #AttemptedHomeInvasion
92e34978-a71e-4b83-9d98-fe34626393fe.controller_advice: Attempted to enter a property unauthorized with intent to commit a crime: Remain quiet, do not confront the burglars. Remember as much detail for the police. Call law enforcement.

1ef09b47-acb9-4629-9d55-736689c184c5.name: #AttemptedMurder
1ef09b47-acb9-4629-9d55-736689c184c5.controller_advice: Unsuccessful attempt to cause someone's death:Gather information, dispatch emergency services, ensure safety

b5b7dcae-9da3-4f90-ae3b-b511a9afc99c.name: #AttemptedSuicide
b5b7dcae-9da3-4f90-ae3b-b511a9afc99c.controller_advice: A suicide attempt is when someone harms themselves with any intent to end their life, but they do not die as a result of their actions.

b79cf76f-743c-4406-bb69-3a2899bece93.name: #AttemptedTheft
b79cf76f-743c-4406-bb69-3a2899bece93.controller_advice: User trying to steal something but not succeeding

1eb18037-1de5-4ed9-9a63-196bff33ea59.name: #AttemtedHijacking
1eb18037-1de5-4ed9-9a63-196bff33ea59.controller_advice: to seize possession or control of a vehicle from another person by threat of force: Remain calm, follow the hijacker's instructions for safety. Remember as much detail for the police.

52a67c31-1457-4e5f-9143-49f6addec000.name: #BeingStalked
52a67c31-1457-4e5f-9143-49f6addec000.controller_advice: Persistent unwanted attention or harassment from an individual:Gather information, advise caller to document incidents, report to police

502514fa-ed5c-4d89-b5ef-fa23db01950b.name: #BLEButtonIssue
502514fa-ed5c-4d89-b5ef-fa23db01950b.controller_advice: Bluetooth button giving problems. Refer the client to the Support Desk for support documentation and submit a ticket.

b618a42e-44d3-4d06-826d-93983c3777ad.name: #Bleeding
b618a42e-44d3-4d06-826d-93983c3777ad.controller_advice: Ask the caller to apply direct pressure to the bleeding site using a clean cloth or their hand. Instruct them to elevate the injured area, if possible, and maintain pressure until the bleeding stops or medical help arrives. Dispatch EMS for further assessment and potential transportation to a medical facility.

0f797aa2-7a63-449e-a644-082a89745a7c.name: #Breakdown
0f797aa2-7a63-449e-a644-082a89745a7c.controller_advice: Breakdown of a vehicle usually requires Roadside Assistance: Find out if the user requires Armed Response.

ee5a592b-8a6a-4d41-898b-0620ae8b39fc.name: #BreakIn
ee5a592b-8a6a-4d41-898b-0620ae8b39fc.controller_advice: 1. Confirm possible break-in 2. Notify the response company 3. Notify SAPS and get a ref number

d17cb7ef-651e-4706-85df-e242b1b7959a.name: #BurglaryForced
d17cb7ef-651e-4706-85df-e242b1b7959a.controller_advice: Unauthorized forced entry into a building with intent to commit an offense:Remain quiet, do not confront the burglars. Remember as much detail for the police. Call law enforcement.

0cd2e163-e084-43cd-a03b-9f13df259fee.name: #BurglaryUnforced
0cd2e163-e084-43cd-a03b-9f13df259fee.controller_advice: Unauthorized entry (without force) into a building with the intent to commit an offense: Advise the person not to touch anything to preserve evidence. Call law enforcement.

2e5503ce-7a2f-409f-bffa-2782311aac88.name: #Burns
2e5503ce-7a2f-409f-bffa-2782311aac88.controller_advice: Determine the severity and extent of the burn. Instruct the caller to cool the burn under running water for at least 10 minutes, if possible. Advise against applying ice, creams, or ointments. Dispatch EMS for assessment and further treatment.

dddad889-9db4-4531-b8cc-a916de5fa073.name: #BusinessRobbery
dddad889-9db4-4531-b8cc-a916de5fa073.controller_advice: Unauthorized entry into a business property with intent to commit a crime:Instruct the person to stay calm, not to confront the robbers. Remember details. Contact law enforcement.

befdf3cd-6e0c-4a60-9413-5381969ad0a8.name: #CallCentreMarketing
befdf3cd-6e0c-4a60-9413-5381969ad0a8.controller_advice: Client heard of CASI through a call centre marketing call.

d14cb39b-03d9-4a92-89b3-181ad33dec1c.name: #CallNotAnswered
d14cb39b-03d9-4a92-89b3-181ad33dec1c.controller_advice: The alerter does not answer.: Call again, or try to call the other participants (ride) / emergency contacts.

62912ec6-848f-4b62-8ec9-ed6e6107e407.name: #CancelledBeforeArrival
62912ec6-848f-4b62-8ec9-ed6e6107e407.controller_advice: RO was cancelled before arrival therefore he could have been en route but ended up not finishing the response.

727ee91c-5d4e-4939-b090-9785f30c2ed8.name: #CancelledBeforeDispatch
727ee91c-5d4e-4939-b090-9785f30c2ed8.controller_advice: Panic was cancelled before the partner successfully dispatched a vehicle.

fbedac7d-e04d-4bd4-8606-a59700571812.name: #CardiacArrest
fbedac7d-e04d-4bd4-8606-a59700571812.controller_advice: Instruct the caller to immediately start CPR (if trained) and provide clear instructions for performing chest compressions. Dispatch emergency medical services (EMS) to the location and stay on the line to offer guidance and support until help arrives.

e4c71f28-2349-455a-8b5d-613809f0393b.name: #CellphoneTheft
e4c71f28-2349-455a-8b5d-613809f0393b.controller_advice: This is a tag for incidents where the cellphone of a victim is taken without their permission with the intent to permanently deprive them of it.

a243b25b-a93f-49a9-9ccf-dfc22cfe1c88.name: #ChestPain
a243b25b-a93f-49a9-9ccf-dfc22cfe1c88.controller_advice: Collect details about the location and characteristics of the chest pain, such as intensity and duration. Instruct the caller to stay calm and avoid exertion. Dispatch EMS to evaluate the situation.

ba836a40-9f3a-4dbe-94e1-a716ceb8f11b.name: #ChildFound
ba836a40-9f3a-4dbe-94e1-a716ceb8f11b.controller_advice: When someone find a child report it to SAPS.

fde69b30-ace1-463e-9358-3c29298589ef.name: #ChildInvolved
fde69b30-ace1-463e-9358-3c29298589ef.controller_advice: When speaking to a child remember to be gentle and reassuring. If the child is the one in trouble then use it to push urgency from our responders.

7a33b541-f5f7-45da-b844-1850c81db2a6.name: #ChildServices
7a33b541-f5f7-45da-b844-1850c81db2a6.controller_advice: Any panic where children are in danger: Child services should be contacted. They'll need the location, child information and description. Dispatch a Partner and SAPS.

9cd62a59-0236-4462-b6d7-22eead3f1b1e.name: #Choking
9cd62a59-0236-4462-b6d7-22eead3f1b1e.controller_advice: Ask the caller if the person can speak or cough. If they are unable to breathe cough or speak, instruct the caller to perform the Heimlich maneuver (abdominal thrusts) if trained. If the person becomes unresponsive, guide the caller to start CPR until EMS arrives.

ef8cd225-042d-4316-abc8-1fb5d001412d.name: #C-I-T-Heist
ef8cd225-042d-4316-abc8-1fb5d001412d.controller_advice: Cash-in-transit heist involving robbery or theft of money in transit:Gather information, ensure caller's safety, dispatch appropriate authorities

1cb9d448-dff0-4b86-8a24-c083cb5f6918.name: #Collision
1cb9d448-dff0-4b86-8a24-c083cb5f6918.controller_advice: Ensure the user's safety first. Encourage them to document the scene, and call the police if necessary.

5fafcd7a-6e86-41c3-806d-1ddc0b0d730e.name: #CommercialCrime
5fafcd7a-6e86-41c3-806d-1ddc0b0d730e.controller_advice: Criminal activities targeting businesses or involving business operations:Gather details, notify relevant authorities

0b4acef0-a358-4afd-928b-839304331c0d.name: #Deceased
0b4acef0-a358-4afd-928b-839304331c0d.controller_advice: Please stay calm and follow my instructions carefully. Please leave everything as is and remain where you are if it's safe, or move to a secure location nearby. We need to preserve the scene for emergency services.

36ed7b5a-9854-4d93-8b24-bd339b756c69.name: #DelayedETA
36ed7b5a-9854-4d93-8b24-bd339b756c69.controller_advice: ETA received very late into the panic. Escalate to partner management and notifiy CASI management.

c1a0328a-62a3-4adb-ba65-ebfce752d85b.name: #DevTesting
c1a0328a-62a3-4adb-ba65-ebfce752d85b.controller_advice: This occurrence/incident is a test. The developer is probably troubleshooting something.

28b19405-9551-4320-beab-8b806592f327.name: #Diabetic
28b19405-9551-4320-beab-8b806592f327.controller_advice: This tag must be used for clients who are reporting diabetic medical emergencies

8ed65251-3815-4a75-b6e4-ca665c6ff9e0.name: #DifficultyBreathing
8ed65251-3815-4a75-b6e4-ca665c6ff9e0.controller_advice: Gather information about the person's condition, such as any known respiratory conditions or triggers. Instruct the caller to stay calm and in a well-ventilated area. Dispatch EMS for further assessment and treatment.

ff04aa93-977e-439e-839b-074a3ebbe1a1.name: #Disturbance
ff04aa93-977e-439e-839b-074a3ebbe1a1.controller_advice: When a client is complaining about people making noise or being disruptive use this tag as long as no violence or vandalism occurs.

ed0139b7-4554-438b-9897-1ed3af43343f.name: #DomesticAbuse
ed0139b7-4554-438b-9897-1ed3af43343f.controller_advice: Violence or aggression that occurs in the domestic setting:Ensure person is safe. Listen and provide support. Advise them to contact local law enforcement and a local domestic violence hotline.

de7b239c-8ca9-49f7-aff1-1342f4f393e3.name: #Drinking&Driving
de7b239c-8ca9-49f7-aff1-1342f4f393e3.controller_advice: Operating a vehicle while under the influence of alcohol or drugs:Gather details, advise against driving, inform police

ff9386ed-77bd-4a70-ba15-05ec739f58d0.name: #DriverAttemptingRobbery
ff9386ed-77bd-4a70-ba15-05ec739f58d0.controller_advice: Advise the rider to prioritize their safety, remain calm, and avoid escalating the situation. Recommend reporting the incident to southafrica@bolt.eu or through the e-hailing app and dispatch SAPS immediately.

d825754a-05d3-4cbd-be45-9b6912b76ab2.name: #DriverIssue
d825754a-05d3-4cbd-be45-9b6912b76ab2.controller_advice: Problems with the driver's behavior, driving style, the driver did not show up, or other issues: Encourage the user to report the issue to Bolt. Notify law enforcement if necessary.

672097be-7465-4ced-a7c1-84b8f13f03ea.name: #DriverNotArrived
672097be-7465-4ced-a7c1-84b8f13f03ea.controller_advice: The e-hailing driver did not arrive at the pickup location after accepting the ride.

6300df2e-6398-41a2-953f-23e1731a3e00.name: #DropOff
6300df2e-6398-41a2-953f-23e1731a3e00.controller_advice: Client to be dropped off at the end location of the Ride.

09b2429d-778c-42df-bf62-32a9ed07ccc2.name: #Drowning
09b2429d-778c-42df-bf62-32a9ed07ccc2.controller_advice: Ask the caller if the person is still in the water or has been removed. If the person is unresponsive and not breathing, guide the caller to initiate CPR immediately.

6f71903d-6407-4d44-9ac8-477f58ad3b61.name: #DrugCrime
6f71903d-6407-4d44-9ac8-477f58ad3b61.controller_advice: Activities related to the production, distribution, and consumption of illegal substances:Do not engage or intervene. Remember as many details for a police report. Contact law enforcement.

91dfb7d5-a188-4e74-85da-ba85dbdb13f4.name: #Drugs
91dfb7d5-a188-4e74-85da-ba85dbdb13f4.controller_advice: Any substance (other than food) that is used to prevent or diagnose treat or relieve symptoms - Seek Medical assistance

6c67b454-c01d-4df3-b6ab-b7870d0bd1f5.name: #DuplicatePanic
6c67b454-c01d-4df3-b6ab-b7870d0bd1f5.controller_advice: System duplicated a panic.: Resolve the last panic that came in.

577006f7-e090-42cc-a7af-bc00ca618bde.name: #Dynamicformcomplete
577006f7-e090-42cc-a7af-bc00ca618bde.controller_advice: This tag captures the completion event while logging the user's geographic location and verified proof of presence to ensure submission authenticity.

f285b0e7-e337-46fc-b793-994c040541bf.name: #ElectricFenceAlarm
f285b0e7-e337-46fc-b793-994c040541bf.controller_advice: Validate the alarm. Contact the user if possible. Dispatch a response team or notify law enforcement if needed.

95ce2682-3e5d-4ea9-8699-d99a223f2d7c.name: #ElectricShock
95ce2682-3e5d-4ea9-8699-d99a223f2d7c.controller_advice: Ensure the caller's safety by asking them to disconnect the power source if possible or to move away from the electrical hazard. Instruct the caller not to touch the person if they are still in contact with the electrical source.

b29358ea-1ca2-4b00-bd4d-3f4025029b11.name: #Epilepsy
b29358ea-1ca2-4b00-bd4d-3f4025029b11.controller_advice: Neurological condition involving the brain that makes people more susceptible to having recurrent unprovoked seizures. Gently guide the person to the ground or a soft surface if possible. Support their head to prevent injury.

eaf82b32-db2f-4b50-bccd-f99703333eb2.name: #FeelingUnsafe
eaf82b32-db2f-4b50-bccd-f99703333eb2.controller_advice: Perception of being in a dangerous or threatening situation:Provide reassurance, advise caller to seek safety, involve authorities

787323f8-1a84-4b66-8263-67986196da21.name: #FireAlarm
787323f8-1a84-4b66-8263-67986196da21.controller_advice: Validate the alarm. Contact the user if possible. Notify fire department immediately if validation is positive.

a5cbef39-a2c9-4b86-98e6-8e9756c43a75.name: #FireNaturalDisaster
a5cbef39-a2c9-4b86-98e6-8e9756c43a75.controller_advice: Uncontrolled fire or natural catastrophes such as floods, earthquakes:Leave the area safely, if possible. Follow local authorities' instructions. Contact local emergency services.

2483133d-341f-47be-bb02-700fc7e90c2d.name: #ForcedEntryHouseRobbery
2483133d-341f-47be-bb02-700fc7e90c2d.controller_advice: Unauthorized forced entry into a residential property with intent to commit a crime: Remain quiet, do not confront the robbers. Remember as much detail for the police. Call law enforcement.

84d4a074-584a-447d-8a85-e9bab83b7055.name: #Fracture
84d4a074-584a-447d-8a85-e9bab83b7055.controller_advice: Instruct the caller to immobilize the injured area by supporting it with a splint, if available, or by keeping it as still as possible. Dispatch EMS for evaluation, treatment, and potential transport to a medical facility.

63d24108-6374-4f70-b3b9-dd6e5cad0155.name: #Fraud
63d24108-6374-4f70-b3b9-dd6e5cad0155.controller_advice: Deception intended for personal gain or to cause a loss to another party:Do not share any further personal or financial information. Document all details. Contact law enforcement and bank if necessary.

56bee189-d3c3-46b3-b221-8cbc06205458.name: #GangFights
56bee189-d3c3-46b3-b221-8cbc06205458.controller_advice: Where a group of gangs are fighting in the street, Get response out as well as SAPS.

1e47681b-f12d-4574-b5ce-a96b7e2c782b.name: #GangRelated
1e47681b-f12d-4574-b5ce-a96b7e2c782b.controller_advice: Encourage the reporter to stay safe, avoid direct confrontation, and provide critical information without compromising their security.

dfc844d5-97ea-4cb5-8346-61b1db51a69e.name: #GBH
dfc844d5-97ea-4cb5-8346-61b1db51a69e.controller_advice: Serious physical attack likely to cause severe injury: Ensure the person is safe. If possible apply first aid. Contact medical services and law enforcement.

0404fe13-b79b-4951-af1a-db30e204f366.name: #GBV
0404fe13-b79b-4951-af1a-db30e204f366.controller_advice: This tag is used to flag panics that reference gender-based violence including physical emotional sexual or psychological abuse directed at individuals based on their gender.

05151d11-187e-4aa9-8f3e-b9ca28fe6c28.name: #GoodNewsStory
05151d11-187e-4aa9-8f3e-b9ca28fe6c28.controller_advice: Capture as much details about the incident as possible and ask the user to rate the panic and leave a comment.

2a0a3320-d88f-4def-94b6-c8ad22d0de3a.name: #GroupFights
2a0a3320-d88f-4def-94b6-c8ad22d0de3a.controller_advice: Fight between more than 2 people: Guide the user to not confront any of the people. Go to a safe place if possible.

eeae20fb-8743-48bc-a928-b73d00f2c65d.name: #HeadInjury
eeae20fb-8743-48bc-a928-b73d00f2c65d.controller_advice: Inquire about the mechanism of injury and the person's level of consciousness. Instruct the caller to monitor the person closely for changes in their condition, advise against moving them unnecessarily, and keep them still until EMS arrives.

862993f8-d6d8-49bc-a1fc-645eaddbe5dc.name: #Heatstroke
862993f8-d6d8-49bc-a1fc-645eaddbe5dc.controller_advice: Instruct the caller to move the person to a cooler environment, remove excess clothing, and cool them down using cool water or wet towels.

6b8ae689-bddd-4eb4-ae20-88adf4e5224a.name: #Hijacking
6b8ae689-bddd-4eb4-ae20-88adf4e5224a.controller_advice: Forcibly taking control of a vehicle:Remain calm, follow the hijacker's instructions for safety. Remember as much detail for the police.

297ac3ee-1d3f-411f-87de-a96d97b63e95.name: #HomeInvasion
297ac3ee-1d3f-411f-87de-a96d97b63e95.controller_advice: Unauthorized entry with intent to commit a crime, often theft:Remain quiet, do not confront the burglars. Remember as much detail for the police. Call law enforcement.

6895e71f-33be-416d-87ff-0a8fa777d27a.name: #Homicide
6895e71f-33be-416d-87ff-0a8fa777d27a.controller_advice: Unlawful killing of another human being:Ensure the person is safe. If possible, apply first aid. Contact medical services and law enforcement.

dad47cfa-232f-4018-88c9-395d28c434a7.name: #HouseFire
dad47cfa-232f-4018-88c9-395d28c434a7.controller_advice: Dispatched armed response Fire department and Medical assistance to the location - Identify any injuries due to fire

206bf12e-626b-4f49-8fbb-dba07be95b12.name: #Hypothermia
206bf12e-626b-4f49-8fbb-dba07be95b12.controller_advice: Instruct the caller to move the person to a warm environment and remove wet clothing. Encourage them to wrap the person in warm blankets or clothing, provide warm liquids if the person is conscious.

a77e0532-f283-4701-b9e9-a1a14dd810fa.name: #IllegalFirearmPossession
a77e0532-f283-4701-b9e9-a1a14dd810fa.controller_advice: Possessing a firearm without the necessary legal permissions or licenses:Do not confront the person with the firearm. Try to remember details. Contact law enforcement.

a3ca942d-1194-4b5e-a413-a2d691676027.name: #IllegalStrike
a3ca942d-1194-4b5e-a413-a2d691676027.controller_advice: A strike that has become out of hand resulting in sabotage, damage of assets, or Arson: Remain calm and tell the alerter to stay clear of the striking group and seek shelter in a closed-off premises. Dispatch SAPS

cfed8088-e741-447c-8fc3-dacf1e505ce4.name: #InaccurateLocation
cfed8088-e741-447c-8fc3-dacf1e505ce4.controller_advice: Location provided for the Dispatched Panic is inaccurate. Report the incident to management to follow up with the client.

8f49b9ee-b19c-43c9-873b-b2f1c268ee8e.name: #Injury
8f49b9ee-b19c-43c9-873b-b2f1c268ee8e.controller_advice: Inquire about the mechanism of injury (how it happened) and identify the specific location and severity of the trauma. Assess the person's level of consciousness and check for life-threatening symptoms like heavy bleeding or deformity.

9625d663-243e-4ddb-9373-5714f28d272d.name: #Intimidation
9625d663-243e-4ddb-9373-5714f28d272d.controller_advice: Behavior intended to frighten or coerce someone:Gather details, advise caller to ensure personal safety, report to police

ecc4e32f-1d2a-4e4a-b4a7-6d8767486894.name: #IntrusionAlarm
ecc4e32f-1d2a-4e4a-b4a7-6d8767486894.controller_advice: Validate the alarm. Contact the user if possible. Dispatch a response team or notify law enforcement if needed.

63806431-e7f4-4dd5-8602-d024d239b680.name: #IOTDeviceIssue
63806431-e7f4-4dd5-8602-d024d239b680.controller_advice: Personal Tracker/ IOT Device/ Standalone Device giving problems. Refer the client to the Support Desk.

2b6079fe-546b-422b-a004-aede0940f3e7.name: #Kidnapping
2b6079fe-546b-422b-a004-aede0940f3e7.controller_advice: Unlawful carrying away (asportation) and confinement of a person against their will: Stay calm. Gather as much information as possible. Contact law enforcement immediately.

d1ac3ea6-61e8-4717-9843-45613953c63a.name: #Labour
d1ac3ea6-61e8-4717-9843-45613953c63a.controller_advice: Labour is divided into 3 stages. For first-time mothers, labour takes around 12 to 14 hours. Encourage her to move around and get into the position she feels most comfortable in. - Dispatched medical assistance to location

75292d0b-e6c9-4364-971f-b9af0fe40567.name: #LastFourDigitsConfirmed
75292d0b-e6c9-4364-971f-b9af0fe40567.controller_advice: Confirming the last four digits of a user's cellphone number or their passphrase is essential

3df9e76e-2573-405f-84fc-e9cf4198bfed.name: #LeftPanicArea
3df9e76e-2573-405f-84fc-e9cf4198bfed.controller_advice: This is when the alerter left the panic area.

0d5a3b8e-8e2c-4980-8abf-f91a6e4df4d4.name: #LoadShedding
0d5a3b8e-8e2c-4980-8abf-f91a6e4df4d4.controller_advice: No electricity in the area due to Load shedding.

2d9d9c9f-7b95-4005-ae78-6add316dd62a.name: #LongStandOff_30+
2d9d9c9f-7b95-4005-ae78-6add316dd62a.controller_advice: This is when a responder is standing off with a client for more than 30min.

b2feb38a-b1fa-4ecd-9a46-9c6029913bcd.name: #LossOfConsciousness
b2feb38a-b1fa-4ecd-9a46-9c6029913bcd.controller_advice: Determine if the person is breathing and if there are any signs of life. If unresponsive and not breathing normally, guide the caller through initiating CPR until EMS arrives.

ae43660a-00de-457d-9e15-c0fdcad477ff.name: #LostKey
ae43660a-00de-457d-9e15-c0fdcad477ff.controller_advice: User has lost their car key: Dispatch a locksmith or roadside assistance service. Provide reassurance.

3952910d-c6e0-4786-b1e7-9aa86854e520.name: #MaliciousPropertyDamage
3952910d-c6e0-4786-b1e7-9aa86854e520.controller_advice: Malicious damage to property: Call Law enforcement

93dde6af-4f46-4426-bf0a-84329a6f8247.name: #ManualDispatch
93dde6af-4f46-4426-bf0a-84329a6f8247.controller_advice: When CASI control room receives a call / panic, but the location differs. We need to get all the information for the manual dispatch.

3cba7f10-d900-48d0-bcb7-ba21d2a8542b.name: #MechanicalFailure
3cba7f10-d900-48d0-bcb7-ba21d2a8542b.controller_advice: Breakdown due to engine trouble, battery failure, flat tire, etc.: Provide reassurance. Dispatch a roadside assistance service.

19ce51b9-3894-4da5-97f4-f118964d34d8.name: #MedicalAlarm
19ce51b9-3894-4da5-97f4-f118964d34d8.controller_advice: Contact the user to assess the situation. Notify medical services immediately if validation is positive.

476707cc-0127-484d-b4d5-146f043944e1.name: #MentallyUnstable
476707cc-0127-484d-b4d5-146f043944e1.controller_advice: Extreme anxiety or paranoia. Delusions or hallucinations. Exhibiting aggressive or violent behavior. - Get SAPS and Medical assistance

f3d04689-8dbe-456b-b3e7-1ee1d12b7f4f.name: #MeterTaxiInterference
f3d04689-8dbe-456b-b3e7-1ee1d12b7f4f.controller_advice: Interference or disruption of an e-hailing service by a Meter Taxi.: Advise the alerter to prioritize their safety, remain inside the vehicle, and avoid confrontation.

f61748af-188a-43cf-932c-7f408404830e.name: #MeterTaxiViolence
f61748af-188a-43cf-932c-7f408404830e.controller_advice: Violent or aggressive behavior by a Meter Taxi towards the driver of the e-hailing service.: Advise the caller to prioritize their safety, remain inside the vehicle, and avoid confrontation.

b60a520c-d60c-4cae-86c9-ec6ddd07938c.name: #MissingChild
b60a520c-d60c-4cae-86c9-ec6ddd07938c.controller_advice: Missing child reported: Contact SAPS immediately. Dispatch all Partners in the Area. Escalate panic on CASI Control WhatsApp group. Keep user updated during the panic.

05e99822-1b0f-4ed5-b28e-181196fef1c7.name: #MissingPerson
05e99822-1b0f-4ed5-b28e-181196fef1c7.controller_advice: Someone who has disappeared and whose status as alive or dead cannot be confirmed:Gather all necessary information about the missing person and their last known whereabouts. Inform them to report to local law enforcement immediately.

9c317b13-b7c3-49b7-a773-e3f0ef0d7130.name: #MobJustice
9c317b13-b7c3-49b7-a773-e3f0ef0d7130.controller_advice: The #MobJustice tag describes community actions where crowds punish alleged wrongdoers often violently.

61ea4c59-a7ea-4ebd-8dae-809f59f5248c.name: #Mugging
61ea4c59-a7ea-4ebd-8dae-809f59f5248c.controller_advice: Direct theft from a person in a public place, usually with physical force or threats:Advise the person to hand over belongings without resistance for their safety. Contact law enforcement.

fb6b7cbc-c07d-43dc-95d3-caee178dc301.name: #Murder
fb6b7cbc-c07d-43dc-95d3-caee178dc301.controller_advice: Unlawful killing of another person:Offer condolences, gather details, dispatch emergency services

099854ef-81b2-4214-b921-f73f09393e8e.name: #NoAmbulanceAvailable
099854ef-81b2-4214-b921-f73f09393e8e.controller_advice: The ambulance services are not available (Public / Private) Ask to be transported to the nearest hospital / clinic by friend, family members to get medical help.

5eb954c8-fcc3-4ea2-8504-eede372869a7.name: #NoContactMade
5eb954c8-fcc3-4ea2-8504-eede372869a7.controller_advice: Controller or RO unable to make contact with the user: Phone Emergency contacts, if loaded. Update Dashboard with why the RO was unable to make contact with the user.

f0fa802f-7434-472a-943f-adad5e20ee7d.name: #NoGoArea
f0fa802f-7434-472a-943f-adad5e20ee7d.controller_advice: Responders do not respond to this area as it is deemed too dangerous.: Continue to dispatch SAPS and do everything in our power to respond.

7347656c-81a7-4b6d-9f07-0cb85210c4e7.name: #NoInjury
7347656c-81a7-4b6d-9f07-0cb85210c4e7.controller_advice: No need of any medical assistance due to no injuries reported.

e1d8067e-9c72-4b2b-8f1c-50b02e088a38.name: #NonSecurityEmergency
e1d8067e-9c72-4b2b-8f1c-50b02e088a38.controller_advice: The #NonSecurityEmergency tag is for situations where an armed response partner is dispatched to support an ambulance or other public service in non-threatening circumstances.

7da6852b-b56d-4764-996b-a77ee8e3e5a1.name: #NumberBusy
7da6852b-b56d-4764-996b-a77ee8e3e5a1.controller_advice: Unable to make contact with the user.

8b7145e2-146e-451b-b892-9536e2a96c13.name: #NumberDialedDNE
8b7145e2-146e-451b-b892-9536e2a96c13.controller_advice: The number of the alerter does not exist.: Call again, or try to call the other participants (ride / emergency contacts.

605741ed-8c8f-477f-8deb-2ddd0373e75e.name: #OnCoverReceivedSMS
605741ed-8c8f-477f-8deb-2ddd0373e75e.controller_advice: User was added to a cover by his / her company and received an SMS to download the app.

ce70d2ca-576d-4b48-8020-726faea924f0.name: #OrgCancellation
ce70d2ca-576d-4b48-8020-726faea924f0.controller_advice: Panic was canceled by the organisation that dispatched us.

61facc74-abf1-425c-9d92-b2739ce6507d.name: #OutofProvince
61facc74-abf1-425c-9d92-b2739ce6507d.controller_advice: This tag is created specifically for Gauteng e-Panics which are created by users who are making panics outside of the province of Gauteng

302bbe94-9da0-4537-aabf-68ef762961e5.name: #OutOfTripUnreachableDriver
302bbe94-9da0-4537-aabf-68ef762961e5.controller_advice: The status of the ride is out-of-trip and the driver cannot be reached.: Escalate the panic if the vehicle is stationary in a commercial area. Resolve the panic if the vehicle is in a residential area.

b427d011-8f41-4779-8264-8aee6c925bde.name: #Overdose
b427d011-8f41-4779-8264-8aee6c925bde.controller_advice: Gather information about the substance(s) involved, the person's symptoms, and their level of consciousness. If they become unresponsive and are not breathing, guide the caller to initiate CPR until EMS arrives.

49db1ca6-2a0d-4e0a-a4dc-0342085b2489.name: #PanicAlarm
49db1ca6-2a0d-4e0a-a4dc-0342085b2489.controller_advice: Contact the user to assess the situation. Dispatch a response team or notify law enforcement if needed.

a4a1a2b8-2b1b-4651-b821-6092ed1c78d6.name: #PartnerTraining
a4a1a2b8-2b1b-4651-b821-6092ed1c78d6.controller_advice: Dispatch Panic was created as a result of a new partner training to use the system. Ask the involved parties if the panic may be closed and provide assistance where required.

f0895fe0-8b10-491d-b28a-32739adf404d.name: #PassphraseConfirmed
f0895fe0-8b10-491d-b28a-32739adf404d.controller_advice: Confirming the last four digits of a user's cellphone number or their passphrase is essential

f2bb3460-007d-4d08-bb5c-7b1a8584771c.name: #PatrolRequest
f2bb3460-007d-4d08-bb5c-7b1a8584771c.controller_advice: Gather reasons for the patrol request. Evaluate the urgency and nature of the situation. Coordinate with law enforcement or security personnel to dispatch patrols to the requested area.

d77ca78e-dfb4-40c8-9794-5244720f3432.name: #PayDispute
d77ca78e-dfb4-40c8-9794-5244720f3432.controller_advice: A disagreement about the fare, tips, or other payment-related issues: Ensure both parties remain calm. Facilitate communication between parties and Bolt support if necessary.

f8616ec4-27bf-4eb2-8009-61a5dc808a1b.name: #PedestrianBump
f8616ec4-27bf-4eb2-8009-61a5dc808a1b.controller_advice: The impact of a vehicle hitting a person can result in bone fractures - It depends on injuries to get Medical attention and SAPS out

5fad7beb-8c49-4ff2-a78a-e750a22d6d85.name: #PhysicalAssault
5fad7beb-8c49-4ff2-a78a-e750a22d6d85.controller_advice: Non-aggravated physical attack without a weapon: Keep the person calm, instruct them to find a safe place, do not engage. Contact law enforcement.

03830150-c873-453a-91cf-f01018697723.name: #Poisoning
03830150-c873-453a-91cf-f01018697723.controller_advice: Ask the caller about the type of substance involved and the person's symptoms. Advise against inducing vomiting unless directed by medical professionals. Dispatch EMS for evaluation and to provide appropriate treatment.

8b39c633-0cd3-4d30-871c-efa9c5055c4c.name: #PotholeDamage
8b39c633-0cd3-4d30-871c-efa9c5055c4c.controller_advice: Ensure the user's safety. Arrange for vehicle repair or tow service as necessary.

6f4ea62c-8dfe-4118-9691-a7f74b9bc0ae.name: #PowerOutageAlarm
6f4ea62c-8dfe-4118-9691-a7f74b9bc0ae.controller_advice: Validate the alarm. Contact the user if possible. Coordinate with the service provider to address the issue.

fdabd196-3754-46ff-a901-4619d86fe3cd.name: #Pregnant
fdabd196-3754-46ff-a901-4619d86fe3cd.controller_advice: A full-term pregnancy has three trimesters and lasts around 40 weeks. Medical services required

531295c3-7254-437a-9cbd-c4fb91b5a645.name: #PublicViolence
531295c3-7254-437a-9cbd-c4fb91b5a645.controller_advice: Public disturbance often involving destruction and disorder:Leave the area if safe, avoid crowds, do not engage in the violence. Contact law enforcement.

93149e1e-bb8c-45b0-ab0e-17c0ee88c43f.name: #RansomExtortion
93149e1e-bb8c-45b0-ab0e-17c0ee88c43f.controller_advice: Demanding money or valuable goods under threats, often for releasing kidnapped victims:Stay calm. Do not negotiate on your own. Gather as much information as possible. Contact law enforcement immediately.

f049588c-d7f0-42aa-b9cc-3bf0c40da922.name: #Rape
f049588c-d7f0-42aa-b9cc-3bf0c40da922.controller_advice: Penetration without the consent of the victim: Keep the client calm, Urge the client to reach out to local authorities and undergo a rape kit, Call law enforcement

ae425c69-e663-4214-b082-142d0d2e71e6.name: #RedZone
ae425c69-e663-4214-b082-142d0d2e71e6.controller_advice: Dangerous Area causing delays in the response due to high risk

ee0bdf88-d8b1-4a2f-9f5f-0b6363ae15f6.name: #RiderAttemptingRobbery
ee0bdf88-d8b1-4a2f-9f5f-0b6363ae15f6.controller_advice: Advise the driver to prioritize their safety, remain calm, and avoid escalating the situation. Recommend reporting the incident to southafrica@bolt.eu or through the e-hailing app and dispatch SAPS immediately.

94dc1dca-09cb-483c-9842-f6c9749e3078.name: #RiderFeelingUnsafe
94dc1dca-09cb-483c-9842-f6c9749e3078.controller_advice: The rider feels unsafe or threatened during the ride: Advise the rider to prioritize their safety, communicate their concerns to the driver (if comfortable), and request an immediate stop at a safe location if needed.

7b9c3441-2b31-4c64-89cd-12fb2acc1221.name: #RiderIssue
7b9c3441-2b31-4c64-89cd-12fb2acc1221.controller_advice: When a driver experiences problems with the rider under the influence / not paying his ride / verbal disputes.

6470005f-8f50-4e9d-ba46-36a2f6729aca.name: #RoadsideSecurity
6470005f-8f50-4e9d-ba46-36a2f6729aca.controller_advice: Advise caller to prioritize safety, move to a safe location, and stay inside their vehicle if necessary. Dispatch appropriate assistance.

ed9181fa-90d9-4ea0-b291-d313c298d8d9.name: #ROContactMade
ed9181fa-90d9-4ea0-b291-d313c298d8d9.controller_advice: RO made contact with the alerter.: Remember to call the alerter to verify his/her safety before resolving.

35fa9ecb-503c-4624-8b1e-483fe3aeb80b.name: #RONoContactMade
35fa9ecb-503c-4624-8b1e-483fe3aeb80b.controller_advice: RO arrived but could not make contact with the alerter.: Help the RO to make contact with the alerter by calling emergency contacts and relating Home/ Work Access details. Make sure that the RO is at the correct location.

65216b41-98c2-4711-983a-4e94f32545ed.name: #SAPSArrived
65216b41-98c2-4711-983a-4e94f32545ed.controller_advice: SAPS arrived at the panic location

8b07d772-fe23-450d-b922-37c3d6dc2d10.name: #SAPSCase
8b07d772-fe23-450d-b922-37c3d6dc2d10.controller_advice: Reference to a case handled by the South African Police Service: Gather details and assess the case. Remember to log the case number/ reference number in comments

d154a382-2281-470f-a192-2c2ddbfe8236.name: #SAPSNoArrival
d154a382-2281-470f-a192-2c2ddbfe8236.controller_advice: SAPS did not arrived at the panic location nor did they provide any assistance. Escalate to management.

63dd1b9b-338f-42b7-af29-acb3eb306904.name: #SeismicSensorAlarm
63dd1b9b-338f-42b7-af29-acb3eb306904.controller_advice: Validate the alarm. Contact the user if possible. Dispatch a response team or notify law enforcement if needed.

8ec869c6-2183-410c-94fb-6242d255b606.name: #Seizure
8ec869c6-2183-410c-94fb-6242d255b606.controller_advice: Guide the caller to clear the area around the person to prevent injury. Instruct the caller to time the seizure, stay on the line, and provide reassurance. Once the seizure ends, advise them to place the person in a safe position.

24b75375-4bad-48dd-8717-11212efce82f.name: #SelfAssisted
24b75375-4bad-48dd-8717-11212efce82f.controller_advice: This tag is to be used when a client cancels due to them managing to get help or assist themselves before we can.

7b35f22d-3d7b-4dc4-8cec-4c7af2b48d06.name: #SexualOffence
7b35f22d-3d7b-4dc4-8cec-4c7af2b48d06.controller_advice: Any type of sexual contact or behavior without the explicit consent of the recipient.:Get to safety and preserve any evidence. Express empathy. Contact law enforcement and a crisis center.

537236b0-1b5f-436d-9cba-7aa7cfdbf252.name: #Shooting
537236b0-1b5f-436d-9cba-7aa7cfdbf252.controller_advice: Firing a gun, either intentionally or accidentally:Instruct the person to take cover, avoid the area. Remember as much detail as possible. Contact law enforcement.

bc0cb42b-69bf-4e65-ab98-8b2c61d5f022.name: #Shoplifting
bc0cb42b-69bf-4e65-ab98-8b2c61d5f022.controller_advice: Theft of merchandise from a retail establishment:Gather information, advise caller to avoid confrontation

d8d1386f-d420-4307-ad60-6b320bb867db.name: #Sick
d8d1386f-d420-4307-ad60-6b320bb867db.controller_advice: Affected with disease or illness; ailing - Seek medical attention

2343687a-54b3-43d4-95ad-09e2466e5c8e.name: #SocialMedia
2343687a-54b3-43d4-95ad-09e2466e5c8e.controller_advice: Client heard of CASI through social media

ef98b3f9-1460-4234-a6b1-dda55063de31.name: #Stabbing
ef98b3f9-1460-4234-a6b1-dda55063de31.controller_advice: Violent act in which a person uses a pointed object to pierce or puncture someone. Can cause serious injury or death, especially if vital organs are hit.

ff0c6128-eef9-4969-8676-3e05c9e7ec9d.name: #StockTheft
ff0c6128-eef9-4969-8676-3e05c9e7ec9d.controller_advice: Illegal taking of livestock or agricultural produce:Collect details, advise securing the area, dispatch authorities

3a83a4a7-eb76-49e0-a535-08e7b4b83b72.name: #Stranded
3a83a4a7-eb76-49e0-a535-08e7b4b83b72.controller_advice: The user is unable to proceed due to environmental conditions or other unforeseen circumstances: Provide reassurance. Arrange for tow service, emergency services, or other help as appropriate.

8662ea62-6129-4951-b253-96a7a6e8dd26.name: #Stroke
8662ea62-6129-4951-b253-96a7a6e8dd26.controller_advice: Use the FAST acronym to assess the situation: Face drooping, Arm weakness, Speech difficulties, and Time to call emergency services. Instruct the caller to note the time the symptoms started.

fd0bcf1a-cd90-4940-88bc-71d8fdac1c04.name: #Suicide
fd0bcf1a-cd90-4940-88bc-71d8fdac1c04.controller_advice: Notify SAPS. Get a ref number. Dispatched medical services to the location to declare person P4 (Deceased). Notify CASI Managers.

8e44da57-8e60-494f-bede-c0f2c7e819ae.name: #SuspectArrest
8e44da57-8e60-494f-bede-c0f2c7e819ae.controller_advice: Apprehension or detention of a person believed to have committed a crime:Gather information, document details, inform authorities

7989b73d-6145-435f-99cb-3add4575ba6f.name: #SuspectedRevenge
7989b73d-6145-435f-99cb-3add4575ba6f.controller_advice: Belief that someone is seeking retaliation or retribution:Gather information, advise caller to prioritize safety, involve authorities

59c573ed-93a0-40fd-99f3-978222e2bf4d.name: #SuspiciousHumanActivity
59c573ed-93a0-40fd-99f3-978222e2bf4d.controller_advice: Behaviors or actions that raise concerns about possible criminal intent:Gather details, advise caller to stay safe, notify authorities

0fd19ee6-bdb9-4f89-bfe2-2e8428bc0e45.name: #SuspiciousVehicle
0fd19ee6-bdb9-4f89-bfe2-2e8428bc0e45.controller_advice: Vehicle that raises suspicions due to its appearance or behavior:Gather details, advise caller to stay safe, report to authorities

ac9e0055-deda-42cc-83d9-be1bfb8315ed.name: #SystemMalfunctionAlarm
ac9e0055-deda-42cc-83d9-be1bfb8315ed.controller_advice: Validate the alarm. Contact the user if possible. Coordinate with the service provider to address the issue.

b5c5eb25-6536-4eee-a972-8b3cb591b20b.name: #TaxiInterference
b5c5eb25-6536-4eee-a972-8b3cb591b20b.controller_advice: Interference or disruption of an e-hailing service by the Taxi Association.: Advise the alerter to prioritize their safety, remain inside the vehicle, and avoid confrontation.

69a910ba-bf3b-4f19-b812-1b98cb619d61.name: #TaxiViolence
69a910ba-bf3b-4f19-b812-1b98cb619d61.controller_advice: Violent or aggressive behavior by the Taxi Association towards the driver of the e-hailing service.: Advise the caller to prioritize their safety, remain inside the vehicle, and avoid confrontation.

64f87116-c98c-471f-ac70-9d6766e2f757.name: #TechnicalIssue
64f87116-c98c-471f-ac70-9d6766e2f757.controller_advice: RO experienced a technical issue, ie. dashboard or app tech issue.: Help our partner if possible, else notify management on the Whatsapp group.

ca1745da-d91b-40ec-90d0-6b0d010eb6ac.name: #Theft
ca1745da-d91b-40ec-90d0-6b0d010eb6ac.controller_advice: This is a general tag for incidents where the property of a victim is taken without their permission with the intent to permanently deprive them of it.

e3b3f8a8-8bbb-4aab-95da-e0e725c1a145.name: #TheftOutOfMotorVehicle
e3b3f8a8-8bbb-4aab-95da-e0e725c1a145.controller_advice: Theft from a motor vehicle:Gather information, advise reporting to police, secure evidence

6584545c-1fa3-44e2-aa22-d08dbce7e71d.name: #ThirdPartyRequest
6584545c-1fa3-44e2-aa22-d08dbce7e71d.controller_advice: Use this tag when the person triggering the panic is requesting assistance for someone else or is at a different location from where they are using the ePanic app.

4528eb3c-e238-4c7b-b265-75c1558d3b2f.name: #Trespassing
4528eb3c-e238-4c7b-b265-75c1558d3b2f.controller_advice: Unauthorized entry onto someone else's property:Gather information, advise caller to secure themselves, inform authorities

7fb8c5cb-a72e-46f6-ac38-55255a36cf27.name: #UnforcedEntryHouseRobbery
7fb8c5cb-a72e-46f6-ac38-55255a36cf27.controller_advice: Unauthorized entry (without force) into a residential property with intent to commit a crime.:Advise person not to touch anything to preserve evidence. Call law enforcement.

f677fff8-65d6-40e7-9246-6c0438d5f980.name: #Unresponsive
f677fff8-65d6-40e7-9246-6c0438d5f980.controller_advice: When a user is unresponsive: Depending on the situation Ambulance should be dispatch ASAP.

310d94e4-13ae-4123-b246-faa466e1a78c.name: #UserCancellation
310d94e4-13ae-4123-b246-faa466e1a78c.controller_advice: Panic was canceled by the user.: Remember to first confirm the user's security code or last four digits of his/her cellphone number before cancelling armed response.

3d561f72-f193-4999-a316-46adc1e2e6b9.name: #UserNotFound
3d561f72-f193-4999-a316-46adc1e2e6b9.controller_advice: Use Tag for when the user cannot be found on scene by the RO

606a7d29-51ca-40ee-b29b-1476e123f696.name: #UserTesting
606a7d29-51ca-40ee-b29b-1476e123f696.controller_advice: The user tested the panic button. Resolve the panic once the user has confirmed his security code or last four digits.

98349d2f-7034-4884-901c-62020dfccbfc.name: #Vandalism
98349d2f-7034-4884-901c-62020dfccbfc.controller_advice: Action involving deliberate destruction of or damage to public or private property:Prioritize safety and respond swiftly. Contact authorities, use security tools for evidence, and cooperate with investigators for a quick resolution.

3e85accc-dc19-4dab-a680-684cf33b6015.name: #VehicleAccident
3e85accc-dc19-4dab-a680-684cf33b6015.controller_advice: 1. Check yourself for injuries. If you're injured, call medical services. 2. Check on the well-being of your passengers 3. Get to safety 4. Wait for help 5. Exchange information 6. Get necessary paperwork/documentation/ref#

860366c0-b219-42e2-8728-e311bd4aba00.name: #VehicleCollision
860366c0-b219-42e2-8728-e311bd4aba00.controller_advice: 1. Stop your car and stay on the scene. Switch on your hazards to warn other drivers. 2. Help anyone who has been hurt. 3. Get the details. 4. Report the accident.

9d402fdf-5159-445d-ae68-6ebc53c0935c.name: #VehicleGoingOffRoute
9d402fdf-5159-445d-ae68-6ebc53c0935c.controller_advice: The e-hailing vehicle deviates from the intended route or designated area.: Advise the alerter to prioritize their safety, remain calm, and avoid confrontation.

95000d71-1d06-4b54-8408-78cb85570035.name: #VehicleTheft
95000d71-1d06-4b54-8408-78cb85570035.controller_advice: Unlawful taking of another person's vehicle:Confirm the vehicle has been stolen, gather vehicle information. Contact law enforcement.

f17793a7-92a9-48a3-9ec3-63d2e94c03f4.name: #VerbalThreat
f17793a7-92a9-48a3-9ec3-63d2e94c03f4.controller_advice: Threat delivered through spoken words, either in person or over the phone:Advise the person to take threats seriously, document all instances, and contact law enforcement.

fa914fef-9a51-4c5c-8851-e9d88c30aa4c.name: #Voicemail
fa914fef-9a51-4c5c-8851-e9d88c30aa4c.controller_advice: Alerter call is directed to a voicemail/ mailbox.: Call again, or try to call the other participants (ride) or emergency contacts.

330b604b-02a0-4695-a86b-c6fddeeccc5d.name: #WhatsApp
330b604b-02a0-4695-a86b-c6fddeeccc5d.controller_advice: Client heard of CASI through WhatsApp marketing message.

81768bc4-5528-485a-b381-1472290bde6c.name: #WordOfMouth
81768bc4-5528-485a-b381-1472290bde6c.controller_advice: Client heard of CASI through word of mouth

f840faf7-8b1d-497f-96d1-f36595d29133.name: #WrittenThreat
f840faf7-8b1d-497f-96d1-f36595d29133.controller_advice: Threat delivered through written words, either physically or digitally:Advise the person to take threats seriously, preserve the evidence, and contact law enforcement.

3a2b49fe-e0a4-4bb2-8a27-32e594b2002a.name: #WrongDriver
3a2b49fe-e0a4-4bb2-8a27-32e594b2002a.controller_advice: The driver who arrived is not the one shown in the app: Advise the user not to take the ride. Notify Bolt support at southafrica@bolt.eu.

965895da-a13b-4151-b273-ae01016792d5.name: #WrongVehicle
965895da-a13b-4151-b273-ae01016792d5.controller_advice: The vehicle that arrived is not the one shown in the app: Advise the user not to take the ride. Notify Bolt support at southafrica@bolt.eu.

546f3b6c-384b-4023-a879-59330abfd968.name: #ZoneViolation
546f3b6c-384b-4023-a879-59330abfd968.controller_advice: Obtain the specific details of the zone violation, including the location and any suspicious activity observed. Instruct the caller to prioritize their own safety and avoid confronting the individual(s) directly. Notify the appropriate authorities or security personnel to respond and address the situation.
